title: Skill catalog, system prompt listing, and diagnostics
purpose: The model needs to know what skills exist before it can invoke them. The SkillCatalog scans 7-tier search directories, holds parsed metadata, produces a formatted listing with behavioral instructions for system prompt injection, and collects diagnostics for shadowed skills and non-conformant metadata.
task: Create skill/catalog.rs with a SkillCatalog that scans ordered search directories, stores SkillMetadata per skill, produces a listing with when_to_use appended, and tracks diagnostics. First-match-wins on name collision with diagnostic for shadowed skills.

requirements.title: SkillCatalog struct
requirements.spec: skill/catalog.rs SHALL define a SkillCatalog struct with scan(), list(), get(), system_prompt_listing(), and is_empty() methods. The catalog SHALL be Send + Sync.
acceptance: list() returns Vec<(String, String)> of (name, description) pairs
is_empty() returns true when no skills were discovered

requirements.title: Seven-tier directory scan with first-match-wins
requirements.spec: WHEN scan() processes the ordered directory list, a skill name found in an earlier directory SHALL take precedence. The later entry SHALL be skipped and a diagnostic recorded noting the shadow.
acceptance: Two directories both containing 'deploy': only the first is returned by get('deploy')
list() contains exactly one entry per unique skill name
A shadowed skill produces a diagnostic with the shadowing path

requirements.title: Listing with when_to_use and behavioral instruction
requirements.spec: system_prompt_listing() SHALL exclude skills where disable_model_invocation is true. For each included skill, description and when_to_use SHALL be concatenated. The listing SHALL include a behavioral instruction telling the model to call the skill tool when a task matches.
acceptance: A skill with disable_model_invocation: true does not appear in the listing
A skill with when_to_use: 'Use when X' has description + when_to_use concatenated
The listing starts with '# Available Skills' and a behavioral instruction line
When no skills exist, system_prompt_listing() returns empty string

boundaries: SHALL NOT wire the catalog into the ToolContext — that is NS-007
SHALL NOT implement slash command registration — that is NS-006
SHALL NOT implement template expansion — that is NS-003
verification: cargo test -p norn -- skill::catalog passes all new tests
No file exceeds 500 lines of code (excluding tests, comments, whitespace)
